creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hello i compiled program MellowPlayer with gcc6 but have g++6: internal compiler error: Segmentation fault (program cc1plus)

lol@ ~/C/M/build> cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc6 -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++6 ..
